w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: This Agreement governs the loan entered into between
(“the Credit Provider”) and the Applicant (“the Borrower”).
By accepting this Agreement electronically or otherwise, the Applicant confirms that they have read, understood, and agreed to all terms and conditions contained herein.
2.1 The Applicant applies for a loan in the language of their choice via the Credit Provider’s Loan Management System (LMS), website, or mobile application.
2.2 Approval of the loan remains at the sole discretion of the Credit Provider, subject to affordability assessment and verification.
2.3 Upon approval, the loan amount (or net proceeds after settlement of any existing loan) will be paid into the Applicant’s nominated bank account.
3.1 The Applicant irrevocably authorises their Employer to deduct agreed repayment amounts (monthly, fortnightly, or weekly) from their salary until the loan is fully settled.
Deductions will continue until all obligations are settled
The Employer may deduct the full outstanding balance from final salary or any amounts due upon termination of employment
3.3 The Applicant authorises the Employer to share relevant employment and payroll information with the Credit Provider where reasonably required.
4.1 The Applicant authorises the Credit Provider to issue debit instructions against their bank account via NAEDO in the event that:
Debit orders may be processed on or near salary dates
Multiple debit attempts may be made for unpaid instalments
Bank charges may be incurred for debit instructions
4.3 The Applicant consents to NAEDO tracking functionality for payment collection and tracing purposes.
5.1 The Applicant confirms that prior to entering into this Agreement, they were provided with a quotation detailing:
5.2 The Applicant acknowledges and accepts the full cost of credit.
All information provided is true, accurate, and complete
They can afford the repayments without becoming over-indebted
6.2 The Applicant acknowledges that providing false or misleading information constitutes a breach of this Agreement.
7.1 The Applicant consents to the Credit Provider:
Accessing their credit profile from registered credit bureaus
Reporting the loan and repayment behaviour to such bureaus
8.1 The Applicant consents to the collection, processing, storage, and sharing of their personal information in accordance with applicable data protection laws.
8.2 Personal information may be used for:
8.3 Personal information may be shared with:
Debt collectors, attorneys, and tracing agents where necessary
8.4 The Applicant acknowledges their rights to:
Request correction or deletion where applicable
8A.1 The Credit Provider will retain the Applicant’s personal information only for as long as is necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, including but not limited to:
The administration and enforcement of this Agreement
Compliance with legal and regulatory obligations
Resolving disputes and enforcing legal rights
8A.2 The Applicant acknowledges and agrees that the Credit Provider may be required to retain personal information for a period after the termination or settlement of this
Agreement, as required by applicable law, including obligations under the National Credit Act and other applicable legislation.
8A.3 The Applicant may request the correction, deletion, or restriction of their personal information. Such requests will be considered in accordance with applicable law.
8A.4 The Credit Provider reserves the right to decline a request for deletion where:
The information is required to comply with a legal obligation
The information is required to establish, exercise, or defend a legal right
The information is required for legitimate business purposes, including audit and record-keeping
8A.5 Where personal information is no longer required and no lawful basis for retention exists, the Credit Provider will take reasonable steps to:
8A.6 The Credit Provider will implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to safeguard personal information against loss, unauthorised access, or unlawful processing.
9.1 The Applicant agrees to receive all communication electronically via:
Electronic acceptance constitutes a legally binding signature
Documents delivered electronically are valid and enforceable
10.1 The Applicant consents to being contacted for:
10.2 Marketing communication will only be sent where separately consented to by the Applicant.
11.1 The Applicant has the right to cancel this Agreement within
Repay the full loan amount received
11.3 Interest and reasonable costs for the period the loan was used may apply.
12.1 The Applicant may settle the loan at any time.
Less any future interest and service fees not yet accrued
13.1 The Applicant will be in default if:
Any term of this Agreement is breached
13.2 The Credit Provider will issue a written notice allowing
13.3 The notice will inform the Applicant of their rights, including:
Referring the matter to a debt counsellor
14.1 If the Applicant fails to remedy the default, the Credit Provider may:
14.2 The Applicant agrees to the jurisdiction of the Magistrate’s Court.
14.3 The Applicant will be liable for reasonable legal and collection costs as permitted by law.
Use of third-party tracing agents if contact is lost
16.1 The parties choose their provided addresses as
16.2 Changes must be communicated in writing via:
The loan is fully settled, or
18.1 This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties.
18.2 Any amendments must be in writing.
18.3 If any clause is found invalid, the remaining clauses remain enforceable.
Credit carries financial obligations and risks
Failure to repay may negatively impact their credit profile and financial position
By accepting this Agreement, the Applicant confirms that they:
Have read and understood all terms
Agree to be bound by this Agreement
Consent to all authorisations contained herein
